title: uragoga citrifolia
intro: Uragoga citrifolia, also known as the Java plum or Uva de Goma, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia and Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve fever, and reduce inflammation, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. Uragoga citrifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or capsules, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
